---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a software issue, crash, or unexpected behavior in Apex Diagnostics"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug. What is failing?

## 👣 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to tab '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste terminal/build logs here.

## 💻 Environment Details
* **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11 Pro, WinPE build 22621]
* **Diagnostics Mode:** [e.g. Live Windows, Bootable PE ISO]
* **Target Hardware:** [e.g. Intel Core i9-13900K, Samsung 990 Pro SSD, 32GB DDR5]
* **System Language:** [e.g. Turkish, English]
